name: Bayraktar TB2
description: Turkish medium-altitude armed tactical drone that revolutionized modern warfare. Carries laser-guided MAM munitions and has proven devastatingly effective against armor, air defense systems, and logistics in multiple conflicts.

specialAbilities.name: SEAD Capability
specialAbilities.description: Proven ability to locate and destroy enemy air defense radars and launchers, suppressing enemy air defenses.

specialAbilities.name: Cost-Effective Attrition
specialAbilities.description: Low unit cost means losses are easily replaced, enabling aggressive employment against high-value targets.
